title: hypaelyptum senegalense
intro: Hypaelyptum senegalense, also known as the African thyme or West African thyme, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hypaelyptum senegalense include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions due to its antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Hypaelyptum senegalense can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the essential oils extracted from the plant for topical applications.
